<svg width="400" height="400" viewBox="0 0 400 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <title>Bicycle</title>
  <desc>A simple vector illustration of a bicycle with a yellow seat on a black background</desc>
  <rect width="400" height="400" fill="#000"/>
  <!-- Bike Frame -->
  <path d="M180 100 L220 100 L265 140 L240 180 L240 280 L220 320 L180 320 L160 280 L160 240 L140 200 L180 100" fill="#333" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Handlebar -->
  <path d="M180 100 C180 80 200 50 220 70" stroke="#666" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Seat -->
  <path d="M240 200 L260 200 L265 180 L260 160 L240 160 L235 180 L240 200" fill="#FFD700" stroke="#666" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Wheel (Left) -->
  <path d="M100 260 C140 260 140 300 100 300 C60 300 60 260 100 260 Z" fill="#333"/>
  <!-- Pedal -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="260" r="8" fill="#666" />
  <circle cx="120" cy="260" r="8" fill="#666" />
  <line x1="100" y1="260" x2="120" y2="260" stroke="#666" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Chain -->
  <path d="M140 200 C160 220 160 260 180 280" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Chainring -->
  <path d="M180 250 C180 270 160 270 160 250 L160 250 L180 250" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Seat Stay -->
  <path d="M240 180 L265 40" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Front Fork -->
  <path d="M220 70 L60 140" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4"/>
  <!-- Brake -->
  <path d="M60 140 L80 140" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>
